novel_claims: I run [rootsandfruit.com](https://rootsandfruit.com/) as a one-person shop: self-hosted WordPress on Cloudways, Kadence, Breeze cache.
From there I split responsibilities on purpose: block work goes through `rootsandfruit/blocks-*`; title and excerpt go through `rootsandfruit/update-post`.
Generic MCP setups often mirror large parts of the REST API.
**What I deliberately left out:** post delete, trash, cache purge.
Breeze cache clears stay manual—I purge after byline changes so logged-out preview matches what I expect.
**Purge Breeze cache** — manual, after byline change, so logged-out preview is trustworthy.
If you wire Cursor MCP the way I describe here, I would start with proof—not faith.
Run **`rootsandfruit/ping`** via MCP and confirm plugin version (1.5.1+ if you need `set-post-author`).
Ship your first piece as **draft + preview**, not straight to publish.
